author: felicepantaleo
body: HLTTiclTrackstersRecoverySequenceL1Seeded_cfi imported the L1-seeded modules but built the sequence from the un-imported unseeded names (NameError on import) and mislabelled the sequence variable. Build it from the imported L1-seeded modules.
title: HLTrigger/Configuration: fix mis-wired L1-seeded TICL Recovery sequence
